name: io.github.hypark5540/cloudcraft-mcp
title: Cloudcraft MCP
description: Unofficial MCP server for reading and managing Cloudcraft architecture blueprints

environmentVariables.name: CLOUDCRAFT_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Cloudcraft API key with access to the target account

environmentVariables.name: CLOUDCRAFT_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Cloudcraft API base URL; HTTPS is required except for loopback testing

environmentVariables.name: CLOUDCRAFT_LOG_LEVEL
environmentVariables.description: Minimum log level written to stderr

environmentVariables.name: CLOUDCRAFT_EXPORT_DIR
environmentVariables.description: Directory under which exported blueprint files may be written

environmentVariables.name: CLOUDCRAFT_ENABLE_WRITES
environmentVariables.description: Enable create and update operations

environmentVariables.name: CLOUDCRAFT_ENABLE_DELETES
environmentVariables.description: Enable irreversible deletes; writes must also be enabled

environmentVariables.name: CLOUDCRAFT_MAX_RESPONSE_BYTES
environmentVariables.description: Maximum bytes accepted from one Cloudcraft API response
